faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Common questions about using the Indosupplier marketplace.
faq.a1: We verify suppliers through business license checks (NIB, SIUP), office/factory photo checks, and in some cases, system admin physical site visits. Verified suppliers get a badge on their profile.
faq.q2: Is there a fee to use the platform?
faq.a2: Searching for suppliers and submitting RFQs is free for buyers. Suppliers can choose between a free tier with limited listings or a premium subscription that unlocks verified badges and priority visibility.
faq.q3: How do I send an RFQ?
faq.a3: You can send a direct RFQ by visiting a supplier's profile and clicking the 'Send RFQ' button, or by creating a broadcast RFQ from your buyer dashboard.
faq.q4: Can I import and export products?
faq.a4: Yes, our platform is optimized for local Indonesian trade as well as export transactions, supporting international documentation verification.
